title: St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam
tagline: St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: The St. Joseph Church is a Roman Catholic parish church located in the heart of Kathanpallam village in Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India. This church comes under the administration of the Dhramapuri Diocese.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kathanpallam
topPlaces.description: Kathanpallam is a village located under the jurisdiction of Orappam Grama panchayat, Bargur block, Krishnagiri district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. This village is 10 km (6.2 mi) away from the capital Krishnagiri.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Refuge Church, Elathagiri
topPlaces.description: Our Lady of Refuge Church, known locally as Adaikala Madha Church, is a 100-year-old church located in Elathagiri village, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the first parish church in Krishnagiri district.

image.alt: Our Lady of Refuge Church, Elathagiri

topPlaces.name: Elathagiri
topPlaces.description: Elathagiri or Eluthagiri is a small village located in Krishnagiri district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. This village is located 3 km away from Bangalore - Chennai Highway also 9 km away from the Krishnagiri District's capital, also called Krishnagiri.

topPlaces.name: Kandikuppam
topPlaces.description: Kandikuppam is a panchayat in Bargur Block, Krishnagiri district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The economy is dependent on mango cultivation.

topPlaces.name: Vinnarasi Madha Church, Kandikuppam
topPlaces.description: The Vinnarasi Madha Church, also called Our Lady of Queen of Heaven Church, is a Roman Catholic Parish Church in Kandikuppam village, Krishnagiri district, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is situated on the Krishnagiri - Bargur National Highway NH48.

topPlaces.name: Kurumber Theru
topPlaces.description: Kurumber Theru (Kurumber street) is a village in Kandikuppam Panchayat, Bargur Block in Krishnagiri district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. The village is surrounded in all directions by small numerous hillocks, greenery trees and plantations.

topPlaces.name: St. Antony's Church, Sundampatti
topPlaces.description: St. Antony Church, Sundampatti is a Catholic church in Sundampatti village, Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Achamangalam
topPlaces.description: Achamangalam is a village in the Tirupattur taluk of Tirupattur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (97 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (92 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam?
faq.a: Stays in St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Joseph Church, Kathanpallam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kathanpallam, Our Lady of Refuge Church, Elathagiri, Elathagiri, Kandikuppam, Vinnarasi Madha Church, Kandikuppam.
